parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Flock destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise flock:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose your Flock incoming webhook URL from your stored secrets and POST a native Flock {text} payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Flock destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Flock incoming webhook (no Apprise)

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Flock token
